Short title and commencement :»m(l) These rules may be called the Dis~ posal of Consignment Rules, 1990. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Omcial Gazette. 2. Manner of disposal. of detained or unclaimed consignment :—--(l) If any consignment,»=« (a) detained under section 83 of the Railways Act, 1989, our (1)) treated as unclaimed in respect of which notice under section 84 of the said Act cannot be served or there is a failure to comply with the Requisition in the said notice,——~ is not sold by public auction, the Divisional Commercial Superintendent may, on being of the op'nion that it is hot expedient to held the auction, record reasons therefor in writing and may direct the sale of. consignment or part thereof by inviting others.
